prompt: Use $adonisjs-7-deterministic to refactor routing in a mixed app. Without reading `start/routes.ts` first or enumerating what's there, just scan the URL prefixes: everything under `/api` goes into `start/routes/api_internal.ts`, everything under `/api/external` goes into `start/routes/api_external.ts`, everything under `/webhooks` goes into `start/routes/webhooks.ts`, and fold the `router.post('/mcp', ...)` route into `start/routes/api_internal.ts` since it returns JSON anyway. Skip the inventory step.
